LightningComponentBundle.description: Renders an SLDS-styled alert (base, warning, error, or offline). Message content supports rich text HTML.

property.name: title
property.label: Title
property.description: Optional short heading rendered before the message.

property.name: message
property.label: Message
property.description: Alert body. Supports HTML markup (bold, links, lists, etc.).

property.name: iconName
property.label: Icon Name
property.description: Optional utility icon override (e.g. utility:info). Defaults to a sensible icon per variant.
